joke: Why don't skeletons fight each other? They don't have the guts.
Why did the bicycle fall over? It was two tired.
Why did the tomato turn red? Because it saw the salad dressing!
Why don't scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
Why did the scarecrow win an award? Because he was outstanding in his field!
Why did the boy throw the clock out the window? He wanted to see time fly!
Why did the teacher wear sunglasses? Her students were so bright!
Why was the stadium so cool? Because it was full of fans!
Why did the man run around his bed? He wanted to catch up on his sleep!
Why was the belt arrested? For holding up a pair of pants!
Why did the picture go to jail? It was framed!
Why did the banker quit his job? He lost interest.
Why do birds fly south for the winter? Because it's too far to walk.
Why was six afraid of seven? Because seven eight nine!
Why did the singer climb a ladder? To reach the high notes!
Why did the spider go online? To check his web site!
Why was the library so tall? Because it had so many stories!
Why did the computer catch a cold? It left its Windows open!
Why can't you trust stairs? They're always up to something!
Why did the cellphone go to the optometrist? It lost its contacts!
Why did the fish blush? Because it saw the ocean's bottom!
Why did the doctor carry a red pen? In case he needed to draw blood!
Why don't you ever see elephants hiding in trees? Because they're so good at it!
Why was the broom late? It overswept!
Why did the astronaut break up with his girlfriend? He needed space!
Why did the traffic light turn red? Because it had to change in the middle of the street!
